images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating a gentle soft smile amidst a tropical waterfall setting. She is dressed in a form-fitting, textured leather biker jacket worn open over a delicate, moisture-clad bikini top that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the leather contrasting sharply with the lush, vibrant greenery. The scene is bathed in a bright, candlelight warm glow that illuminates her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair, ensuring a clear, professional atmosphere without heavy shadows. Captured at eye-level, she exudes an energetic and sporty vibe, her wet straight black silky hair clinging to her shoulders as she interacts candidly with the lens. The background features the rushing waterfall and tropical foliage rendered with high contrast and sharp color grading, utilizing a shallow depth of field to create a creamy bokeh. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
